domain: silk road textile conservation (Dunhuang fragment reassembly)
specific_mechanism: Fragment reassembly: textile fragments must be matched on weave-pattern, dye, fiber; conservation co-evolves with deterioration agents (light, mold, insects)
llm_application: LLM weight fragment recovery: reassemble damaged checkpoint shards by pattern-matching weights; conservation algorithm co-evolves with checkpoint-degradation modes.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes silk-road-textile-conservation adversarial-coevolution mapping as proposed.
